comment: FFmpeg pre-built Windows shared DLLs. Pinned for media-win-ffmpeg feature. Mirror to a private S3 bucket if BtbN repo churns; see Risk R2 mitigation in .omc/plans/2026-05-18-windows-ffmpeg-coexist-mf.md. Bumped from n6.1.1 → n7.1.4 because BtbN garbage-collected the 2024-01 6.1.1 release and only ships current major branches (7.1 / 8.1) on rotating autobuilds.
